landing.tagline: A clean place to write Markdown.

saveDialog.imagesFolderPrompt: This document has images. First, choose a folder where the images will be saved. Next, you'll choose where to save the markdown file.
saveDialog.mustSaveInFolder:
The markdown file must be saved inside the image folder "{{folder}}" (or a sub-folder of it) so image links resolve correctly.

Click OK to choose another location.

updater.availableBody: A new version (v{{version}}) is available. Download and install now?

intro.title: A Markdown-native chat input
intro.desc: The star here is the input box below — a Markdown-native field that renders live as you type. Write prompts with WYSIWYG editing: press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a newline.

empty.example: “Show me a Markdown table and a TypeScript code block.”
empty.noKey: No API key is required. Mock streaming is enabled by default.

input.placeholder: Write with Markdown... Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline

config.title: Chat settings
config.desc: Leave empty to use mock streaming. Add your own key to stream from a real model.
config.keyNote: Your API key is saved in this browser (localStorage) and used only here. It is never sent to DOMD servers.

chat.examplePrompt: Show me a Markdown table and a TypeScript code block.

errors.auth: Invalid API key or provider error.
errors.generic: Request failed. Please check your API key or try mock mode.

playground.placeholder: Type here, or start a stream from the panel.
playground.panelDesc: Simulate AI-style Markdown streaming into a WYSIWYG document. Edit freely before and after streaming.
playground.tip: Tip: drop a Markdown file onto the editor to stream it with your current settings.
playground.boundEditorTitle: Click to change the slider's upper bound
playground.noDelay: No delay — chunks queue as fast as the browser can paint
playground.coreNote: The same 20 KB Markdown-native core powers preview, edit, and stream. This page simulates a token-by-token Markdown stream arriving from an AI model — the editor is locked while a stream is running.
